creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Yuri,

Sorry for the delay in responding to this bug report, and thanks for submitting a patch to go with the request - that is always appreciated!

Having had a quick look at this, I am not convinced we should add the ITKV3_COMPATIBILITY option, for a few reasons:

1. According to the itk-snap build documentation, the latest versions of itk-snap are compatible with newer versions of ITK.
http://www.itksnap.org/pmwiki/pmwiki.php%3Fn%3DDocumentation.BuildingITK-SNAP

2. I am planning to update the science/InsightToolkit port to version 5.0.1 today, and this new version removes ITKV3_COMPATIBILITY. Therefore, this is not a sustainable solution.

Happy to continue this conversation, here in the bug report, but I am going to mark it as closed unless the subsequent conversation reveals that it should be done. Happy to work with you on this.

How have you gone in getting itk-snap to build and work on FreeBSD - any luck?

Regards,
Ben
